title: Job Opening Teacher at MT Educare

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at MT Educare
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MT Educare. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About MT Educare:
MT Educare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare!
